In the United States, the massively polarized and incredibly chaotic legal war over the Florida presidential recount aggressively exploded into absolute constitutional crisis. ## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)
On November 15, 1884, the incredibly massive, deeply imperialistic, and historically defining Berlin Conference was officially and aggressively convened by German Chancellor Otto von Bismarck. This massive, highly arrogant gathering of 14 major European powers fundamentally and aggressively formalized the "Scramble for Africa." They arbitrarily and massively carved up the entire African continent into absolute colonial territories, completely ignoring massive indigenous cultural and ethnic boundaries, initiating a century of brutal exploitation and horrific, massive atrocities across the continent.

On November 15, 1920, the incredibly massive, universally foundational, and absolutely historic League of Nations held its very first, massive general assembly in Geneva, Switzerland. Born from the horrific, massive carnage of World War I and heavily championed by Woodrow Wilson, this massive intergovernmental organization was aggressively designed to prevent future wars through collective security and massive disarmament. However, the tragic, massive failure of the United States to join deeply crippled its absolute authority, heavily dooming its massive mission and failing to prevent World War II.
